blackKnight.name: The Black Knight
blackKnight.desc: The devil incarnate in a gentleman’s form.

siguanaba.name: The Siguanaba
siguanaba.desc: A female spirit that terrifies men in Salvadoran rivers.

goodAndBadCadejo.name: The good and the bad Cadejo
goodAndBadCadejo.desc: A pair of supernatural beasts that protect or terrify travelers at night.

mulus.name: The Mulus
mulus.desc: A beast that judges the dead in cemeteries.

funeralCortegeOfChalchuapa.name: The Funeral Cortege of Chalchuapa
funeralCortegeOfChalchuapa.desc: A nighttime funeral cortege of the dead.

fairJudgeOfTheNight.name: The Fair Judge of the Night
fairJudgeOfTheNight.desc: A judge who appears at night to punish the guilty.

weepingWoman.name: The Weeping Woman
weepingWoman.desc: A ghostly woman said to wander cemeteries, crying for the dead.

headlessPriest.name: The Headless Priest
headlessPriest.desc: A priest spirit who was decapitated and now roams the streets.

fleshlessWoman.name: The Fleshless Woman
fleshlessWoman.desc: A female spirit that terrifies men on the streets at night.

dwarf.name: The Dwarf
dwarf.desc: A mischievous being who bothers pretty girls.

caveOfSalamanca.name: The Cave of Salamanca
caveOfSalamanca.desc: The devil in a professor’s form who teaches dark arts in a cave.

midnightWasherwomen.name: The Midnight Washerwomen
midnightWasherwomen.desc: Female spirits that terrify men in Galician rivers.

dip.name: The Dip
dip.desc: A vampire dog that terrifies people at night.

urco.name: The Urco
urco.desc: A gigantic chained beast said to herald death.

holyCompany.name: The Holy Company
holyCompany.desc: A ghostly nighttime procession of the dead.

gaueko.name: Gaueko
gaueko.desc: A Basque spirit said to rule the night.

ploranera.name: The Ploranera
ploranera.desc: A ghostly woman said to wander Barceloneta, weeping in the darkness.

ghostOfSanGines.name: The Ghost of San Ginés
ghostOfSanGines.desc: A ghost that appears in the Church of San Ginés.

girlOnTheCurve.name: The Girl on the Curve
girlOnTheCurve.desc: A female spirit that warns men on the streets at night.

trasgu.name: The Trasgu
trasgu.desc: A mischievous being who teases girls.

olomegaLagoonSiren.name: The Olomega Lagoon Siren
olomegaLagoonSiren.desc: A siren said to enchant travelers near the lagoon.

xana.name: The Xana
xana.desc: A water spirit who guards fountains, rivers, and hidden treasures.

aishaKandisha.name: Aisha Qandisha
aishaKandisha.desc: A Moroccan spirit who lures men toward danger.

ghostOfTheWhiteWolf.name: Ghost of the White Wolf
ghostOfTheWhiteWolf.desc: A guardian wolf spirit that guides lost travelers through the forest.

creakingCoffin.name: The Creaking Coffin
creakingCoffin.desc: A ghostly midnight procession announced by the sound of a funeral drum.

cursedBeastOfWolfGorge.name: The Cursed Beast of Wolf Gorge
cursedBeastOfWolfGorge.desc: A black wolf spirit born from a dark pact guards hidden treasure deep within the gorge.

resurrectionMary.name: Resurrection Mary
resurrectionMary.desc: A ghostly young woman appears on lonely roads before vanishing without a trace.

memoryGame.title: Memory game
memoryGame.subtitle: Find each mirror pair from Spanish Mirrors.
memoryGame.win: You matched all {pairs} pairs in {moves} moves and {time}.

pairs.insight: Figures of temptation, contracts, and moral transgression.
Temptations that draw the living toward irreversible ends.
Protectors or creatures that enforce the boundaries of the night.
Omens and beings that announce fate before it arrives.
Collective apparitions that blur the line between the living and the dead.
Judges and sovereigns who govern darkness and justice.
Voices that return when the past refuses to rest.
Souls trapped between worlds by guilt, duty, or unfinished acts.
Encounters where curiosity, desire, or distraction lead to ruin.
Household spirits that reward respect and punish neglect.

memoryGame.getCopy: Get a copy of the book
memoryGame.hintText: Pay attention to the icons. Matching cards share the same symbol.
memoryGame.shareText: I just matched the Salvadoran and Spanish mirror legends. Can you find all 10 pairs?
memoryGame.previewReward: 🏆 You won a preview of the book

pair.insight: Protectors or creatures that enforce the boundaries of the night.
Encounters where curiosity, desire, or distraction lead to ruin.
Protectors or creatures that enforce the boundaries of the night.
Collective apparitions that blur the line between the living and the dead.
Temptations that draw the living toward irreversible ends.
Beings whose songs draw the living away from reason, path, or self.

memoryGame.legendsRarityNote: Some mirror legends are hidden rarities. Play again to see who else appears.

rarityInfoCards.title: Mirror Legend
rarityInfoCards.label: Main collection
rarityInfoCards.description: Stories from the main Spanish Mirrors collection.

rarityInfoCards.title: Rare Mirror
rarityInfoCards.label: Director's Cut
rarityInfoCards.description: Special legends from the Director's Cut edition.

rarityInfoCards.title: Golden Mirror
rarityInfoCards.label: Hidden rarity
rarityInfoCards.description: Special legends discovered through readers, travels, and literary events connected to the project.
